name_en: Chanel ☪️ 25P Spring/Summer Bowling Collection Ap4515 Full of high-end feel, lambskin paired with a gold metal chain ⛓️ Handbag, round shape, definitely a small body with large capacity. Long chain has an OT buckle that is detachable and adjustable, cute and practical. Size: 11.5×18.5×11cm
